classification_rationale: This release promotes ProductOS to V12.0.0 after the v12 living-system and agent-native execution completion passed Ralph-loop inspection, validation, fix, and revalidation.
summary: ProductOS V12.0.0 is the stable release for v12 living-system and agent-native execution completion.
upgrade_actions: Adopt the promoted V12 living-system and agent-native execution completion in the current ProductOS operating flow.
Use the automatic Ralph-gated release promotion command for future successful slices.
Keep product-specific work outside shared repo surfaces and promote only reusable repo assets.
